coach_notes: To build a strong education career, focus on developing early childhood education and child development skills, as these are foundational for understanding student needs. You can start by taking free online courses from platforms like Coursera or edX, and volunteering at local schools or daycare centers to gain hands-on experience. Your existing attention to detail and administrative skills will serve you well as you expand into these new areas—keep up the great momentum!

jobs.title: Youth Success Specialist Intern
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your skills in class management, support teachers, and behavior management align directly with supporting youth success. Experience with programs and events and daily operations is relevant.
jobs.gaps: No specific gaps identified; ensure you highlight your ability to work with youth and support educational activities.

jobs.title: Youth Development Professional (Houston Temple Corps)
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your experience with class management, behavior management, support teachers, programs and events, and daily operations directly aligns with youth development. Security protocols and access are relevant for facility management.
jobs.gaps: No significant gaps; ensure you can demonstrate passion for youth development and community work.

jobs.title: Youth Development Professional (Houston Pasadena Corps)
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Similar to Job 4, your skills in class management, behavior management, support teachers, programs and events, and daily operations are a strong match. Security and access skills are applicable.
jobs.gaps: No major gaps; confirm location preference and ability to work in Pasadena area.

jobs.title: Intern, Emerging Scholars
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your organizational skills, support teachers, and programs and events experience are relevant for an emerging scholars program. Security protocols and access may be useful.
jobs.gaps: May need more academic or research-oriented experience; consider highlighting any tutoring or mentoring roles.

jobs.title: Associate Trainer - Insurance Sales
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your skills in organization, word, and native English could support training delivery, but insurance sales requires specific sales and insurance knowledge.
jobs.gaps: Lack of sales experience, insurance industry knowledge, and training delivery skills. Major gap in sales and insurance domain.
